description: CompositionBlack T-shirt made of 100% polyester, has a round neck, short sleeves with contrast panelling on the sleeves, contrast panelling on the sides below the armhole extending to the back and printed branding on the left chestFitRegularWash careGentle machine wash inside out in cold water with like colours using a mild detergentDo not bleach or dry cleanTumble dry lowWarm iron on reverseThis puma T-shirt has an exclusive casual style and a great look. The branding on the tee ups your style quotient, while the polyester fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable all day. Pair it with denims or tracks and canvas shoes to look your best.Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18”
